examples: If there's anything I can't stand it's an indecisive, wishy-washy customer.
Do we think we're shy and indecisive?
But the wealth of choices can lead to "indecisive" customers who struggle over every detail.
On Sunday, he looked out of position on some running plays and indecisive on others.
He looked indecisive at times and, worse, when he didn't hesitate, he often should have.
